abstract_first400: Current mobile GUI agent benchmarks systematically fail to assess memory capabilities, with only 5.2-11.8% memory-related tasks and no cross-session learning evaluation. notes: memory-centric benchmark with cross-session GUI tasks

title: AgentLeak: A Full-Stack Benchmark for Privacy Leakage in Multi-Agent LLM Systems
abstract_first400: Multi-agent Large Language Model (LLM) systems create privacy risks that current benchmarks cannot measure.
